title: Planning an AI solution
text: Planning an AI solution Last Updated : 2025-10-23 To create a generative AI or machine learning solution that is scalable, cost-effective, high quality, and ethical, you need to make a plan. When you are ready to create a plan for your AI solution, you can use the following types of information to set your strategy, plan your workflow, choose your tools and working methods, and understand solution patterns: Strategic decisions Understand all the factors that you need to consider to make decisions and the possible risks of ignoring factors or changing your decisions later. Workflow Understand the overall process of creating a generative AI or machine learning solution so that you can decide which tasks that you need to complete. Comparisons Understand the features, benefits, and costs of the multiple methods of achieving the same high-level task so that you can choose the best method for your solution. Solution patterns Explore the solution for a realistic enterprise use case with an architecture diagram of the solution, the overall process of solving the use case, and the specific tools and methods used. Learn more Initial strategic decisions Comparison of tools to code Planning your gen AI workflow Planning your ML workflow Solution pattern for answering questions with retrieval-augmented generation
